title: beringeria maroccana
intro: Beringeria maroccana, also known as Moroccan chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to North Africa, particularly in Morocco. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Beringeria maroccana include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Beringeria maroccana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, essential oil, and dried flowers, which can be used to create calming and soothing remedies.
